text: Your phone is three years old and suddenly it's slow.
scene: A simple suggested living room in soft muted colors: just a floor line, a hint of a couch and a small side lamp behind him, light and airy (not a bold flat field). The Owner, a round-headed everyman, sits holding up his smartphone; the phone has a sad sweating face, a red spinning loading swirl on its screen, and stutter lag lines jittering off it. He frowns. Selective pop color: the red loading swirl. Bright and light, subtle background definition. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: Apps lag, the battery's dead by lunch.
scene: Clean bright background. Close on the smartphone: a grid of colorful app squares frozen mid-tap with stutter lines around them, and a battery icon almost empty glowing red. A small yellow sun sits high overhead for midday. Selective pop color: red battery. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: So you start thinking, maybe it's time for a new one.
scene: Clean bright background. The Owner sits scratching his head, a thought bubble above him showing a shiny new smartphone sparkling with a small dangling price tag. Selective pop: green price tag. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: Here's the thing, that slowdown wasn't just age.
scene: Clean bright background. The old smartphone wears a tiny gray beard and leans on a little cane to look elderly, but a big red X is slashed across the beard-and-cane and a red arrow points away — age is NOT the cause. Selective pop: red X. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: On some phones, it was a decision.
scene: Clean bright background. A small sneaky gremlin perched on the smartphone pushes the phone's speed lever all the way down toward a little snail; the lever is labeled SLOW in short handwritten letters. The phone looks startled. Selective pop color: red lever. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: to make your old phone feel worse.
scene: Clean bright background. The smartphone slumps over sweating and exhausted with a snail riding on its back, while the Owner stands beside it frowning with his arms crossed. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: And once you see why,
scene: Clean bright background. The Owner's eyes go wide as he peers through a big magnifying glass, suddenly understanding; a bold red exclamation mark pops over his head. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: it's your printer, your laptop, your washing machine.
scene: Clean bright background. Three generic products stand in a row — a desktop printer, an open laptop, and a front-load washing machine — each with a small sad sweating face, each in its own flat color. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: with a quiet expiration date.
scene: Clean bright background. A pile of the Owner's belongings (phone, printer, toaster, lamp, TV), each with a little paper toe-tag tied to it showing a tiny hourglass instead of a date. The Owner holds a finger to his lips for 'shh'. Selective pop color: red tags. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: And the reason traces back to a secret meeting
scene: Clean bright background. A red dashed trail leads from a pile of modern gadgets across the frame to a simple door standing ajar, a hint of suited figures gathered inside. Selective pop: red dashed trail. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: a hundred years ago about a light bulb.
scene: A soft, subtle warm-cream setting with a simple old-timey hanging lamp above and a small wooden pedestal; cobwebs in the corners to signal long ago. The Immortal Light Bulb — a classic round bulb with a glowing coil filament and a tiny content smile — sits glowing on the pedestal in a gentle pool of light. Selective pop color: warm bulb-yellow glow. Subtle muted background, bright and light. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: Start with the problem no company will say out loud.
scene: Clean bright background. A generic suited businessman stands at a podium with one hand clamped over his own mouth and a zipper across his lips, holding back a thought bubble. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: A perfect product is a business that runs out of customers.
scene: Clean bright background. A bored shopkeeper stands behind a counter holding a single everlasting light bulb that glows; the shop behind him is empty with a lone tumbleweed, and one last customer walks out the door waving goodbye. Selective pop color: bulb-yellow. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: companies realize the most profitable product
scene: Clean bright background. A greedy grinning businessman holds a balance scale: one side a sturdy everlasting glowing bulb, the other a flimsy cracked bulb piled with green money; he tips it toward the money. Selective pop: bulb-yellow and green money. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: It's the one that breaks right after

text: Long enough that you don't blame them.

text: Short enough that you have to buy another.

text: the light bulb over your head.

text: In the early 1920s, light bulbs were getting too good.

text: Some lasted 2,500 hours.

text: It is still on right now.

text: So the bulb makers had a problem.

text: On December 23rd, 1924,

Subtle background definition. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: Ozrom, Phillips, General Electric and others,
scene: Clean bright background. Three generic old-timey bulb-company bosses in suits shake hands in a tight secret huddle, each hiding a light bulb behind his back. Selective pop: bulb-yellow. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: and formed something called the Phoebus Cartel.
scene: A simple suggested boardroom in soft muted warm tones: a round table, a hint of a back wall and a tall window, light and airy (not a bold flat color field). A ring of identical old-timey businessmen in suits and bowler hats — simple outlined doodle figures with flat gray suits, not solid-black silhouettes — lean in around the table, their hands meeting in the center over a single glowing light bulb. Selective pop color: the warm yellow light bulb at the center. Crude doodle linework, bright and subtle. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: No bulb would last more than a thousand hours.
scene: A soft, muted brick-red wash with a simple desk surface line (subtle, not a loud saturated field). An old-timey businessman in a bowler hat (simple outlined doodle figure, flat gray suit) slams a rubber stamp reading WORSE down onto a light-bulb blueprint on the desk, while a big pair of scissors snips the bulb's long glowing filament short. Selective pop color: the yellow bulb and the red stamp. Crude doodle linework, bright and subtle. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags or insignia; draw only what is described.

text: Engineers who'd spent decades making bulbs last longer
scene: Clean bright background. A sad engineer in a lab coat is forced to file down and sabotage a glowing bulb at his workbench while a stern cartel boss points over his shoulder. Selective pop: bulb-yellow. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: And if a company sold a bulb that lasted too long,
scene: Clean bright background. A bulb still glowing proudly, while a stern official slaps a red FINE ticket on a sweating company man and a sack of money is dragged away. Selective pop: red ticket, green money. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: they were fined. There were testing labs whose entire job
scene: Clean bright background. A testing lab: a technician times a glowing bulb against a big clock, nodding as it burns out exactly on schedule, a checklist in hand. Selective pop: red clock. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: This wasn't a cheap product, it was a good one.
scene: Clean bright background. A beautiful glowing quality bulb held in two hands, with a sneaky hand reaching in to deliberately crack it; a single crack line spreads. Selective pop: bulb-yellow, red crack. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: And it worked. Sales went right back up.
scene: Clean bright background. A green sales arrow rockets up off a simple chart while the cartel bosses grin and rub their hands; a heap of dimmed broken bulbs feeds the chart. Selective pop: green arrow. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: The cartel fell apart by World War II,

text: but the idea didn't die with it.
scene: Clean bright background. From the abandoned cartel table, the little green Trick gremlin rises up and grows taller, stretching and grinning, very much alive. Selective pop: green gremlin. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: In the depths of the depression,

text: a man named Bernard London actually wrote a pamphlet
scene: Clean bright background. Bernard London, a Depression-era man in a flat cap and worn coat, proudly holds up a little pamphlet marked with a tiny gear-and-clock symbol, presenting an idea. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: He wasn't exposing the trick.

text: By the 1950s, it wasn't a secret at all anymore.

text: Car makers started redrawing their cars every single year

text: so the one in your driveway would feel old

Selective pop: red arrow. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: The idea had learned its first lesson.

text: It only had to make you feel like they were already behind.
scene: Clean bright background. The Owner looks glum at his perfectly working stuff (phone, TV) which now wear little red 'OLD' tags and feel outdated, even though they work fine. Selective pop: red OLD tags. No year text, no floating numbers, no brand logos, no flags; draw only what is described.

text: And from there, across a century, it kept learning.

text: It learned that breaking things made people angry
